title: Turin, Piedmont — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Turin, Piedmont: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Turin is a city in Piedmont with a population of 848,000. An elegant city at the foot of the Alps, home to FIAT, the Shroud of Turin, Baroque architecture, and a renowned culinary scene.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
